    def test_source_does_not_define_runtime_self_heal_steps_for_train_prompt(self):

>       assert [step.get("name") for step in steps] == [

            "train-prompt.md should define only preflight steps that fail early for missing MCP tokens "
            "or agent-skills bootstrap/install errors."

tests/test_customizations.py:1866: AssertionError
_ TestTrainPromptWorkflow.test_lock_writeback_steps_prefer_copilot_token_before_gh_aw_token _

self = <test_customizations.TestTrainPromptWorkflow object at 0x7f4d30e200b0>

    def test_lock_writeback_steps_prefer_copilot_token_before_gh_aw_token(self):
        text = self._lock_text()
        expected_fallback = (
            "secrets.COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GH_AW_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN"
        )
        assert expected_fallback in text, (
            "train-prompt.lock.yml write-back steps should prefer COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN "
            "before GH_AW_GITHUB_TOKEN so the workflow reaches a token that can open "
            "pull requests instead of stopping at a push-only PAT."
        )
        assert "token: ${{ secrets.COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GH_AW_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}" in text, (
            "train-prompt.lock.yml checkout for create_pull_request should preserve "
            "the COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN fallback."
        )
        assert "GIT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GH_AW_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}" in text, (
            "train-prompt.lock.yml git credential setup for create_pull_request "
            "should preserve the COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN fallback."
        )
        assert "\"github-token\":\"${{ secrets.COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GH_AW_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\"" in text, (
            "train-prompt.lock.yml create_pull_request safe-output config should preserve "
            "the COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN fallback even if some auxiliary reporting steps use "
            "the default GH_AW_GITHUB_TOKEN || GITHUB_TOKEN fallback."
        )
        safe_outputs_steps = self._lock_yaml()["jobs"]["safe_outputs"]["steps"]
        process_safe_outputs = next(
            (step for step in safe_outputs_steps if step.get("name") == "Process Safe Outputs"),
            None,
        )
        assert process_safe_outputs is not None, "Expected Process Safe Outputs step in train-prompt.lock.yml"
>       assert process_safe_outputs["with"]["github-token"] == "${{ secrets.COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GH_AW_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}", (
            "train-prompt.lock.yml should pass the COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN fallback into the "
            "Process Safe Outputs github-script step so create_pull_request does not fall "
            "back to a token that cannot open pull requests."
        )
E       AssertionError: train-prompt.lock.yml should pass the COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN fallback into the Process Safe Outputs github-script step so create_pull_request does not fall back to a token that cannot open pull requests.
E       assert '${{ secrets....THUB_TOKEN }}' == '${{ secrets....THUB_TOKEN }}'
E         
E         - ${{ secrets.COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GH_AW_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
E         ?    --------------------------------
E         + ${{ secrets.GH_AW_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

tests/test_customizations.py:1939: AssertionError
=========================== short test summary info ============================
FAILED tests/test_customizations.py::TestTrainPromptWorkflow::test_source_does_not_define_runtime_self_heal_steps_for_train_prompt - AssertionError: train-prompt.md should define only preflight steps that fail early for missing MCP tokens or agent-skills bootstrap/install errors.
assert ['Validate Gi...s MCP server'] == ['Validate Gi...CP bootstrap']
  
  At index 1 diff: 'Start agent-skills MCP server' != 'Validate agent-skills MCP bootstrap'
  
  Full diff:
    [
        'Validate GitHub token for MCP startup',
  -     'Validate agent-skills MCP bootstrap',
  +     'Start agent-skills MCP server',
    ]

 +    where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7f4d30a47a80> = {'allowed': ['find_agent_skill', 'load_agent_skill', 'run_agent_skill'], 'url': 'http://host.docker.internal:3002/mcp'}.get

FAILED tests/test_customizations.py::TestTrainPromptWorkflow::test_lock_uploads_trainer_workspace_checkpoint_artifacts - AssertionError: train-prompt.lock.yml should collect changed .trainer-workspace checkpoints after the agent run.
assert 'Collect trainer workspace checkpoints' in '#    ___                   _   _      \n#   / _ \\                 | | (_)     \n#  | |_| | __ _  ___ _ __ | |_ _  __...  name: safe-output-items\n          path: /tmp/gh-aw/safe-output-items.jsonl\n          if-no-files-found: ignore\n\n'
FAILED tests/test_customizations.py::TestTrainPromptWorkflow::test_lock_writeback_steps_prefer_copilot_token_before_gh_aw_token - AssertionError: train-prompt.lock.yml should pass the COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN fallback into the Process Safe Outputs github-script step so create_pull_request does not fall back to a token that cannot open pull requests.
assert '${{ secrets....THUB_TOKEN }}' == '${{ secrets....THUB_TOKEN }}'
  
  - ${{ secrets.COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GH_AW_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
  ?    --------------------------------
  + ${{ secrets.GH_AW_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
